INT. RECORDING BOOTH - DAY

A radio DJ sits behind a microphone. Red "ON AIR" light.

                    DJ
          Good morning, you're listening
          to 102.5.

                    DJ (V.O.)
          I never wanted to be on radio.

                    DJ (V.O.) (CONT'D)
          My father wanted me to be a
          lawyer. So did my mother. So did
          everyone, actually.

INT. LAW OFFICE - FLASHBACK - DAY

YOUNG DJ, 22, sits across from his FATHER.

                    FATHER
          You'll thank me in ten years.

                    YOUNG DJ
          I doubt it.

                    FATHER (O.S.)
          You always doubt me.

INT. RECORDING BOOTH - DAY

Back to the booth. The DJ smiles.

                    DJ (CONT'D)
          He was right. I don't thank him.

                    CALLER #1 (O.S.)
          Hi, yes, am I on the air?

                    CALLER #2 (V.O.)
          Hello?

                    DJ
              (into mic)
          You're on, caller one.
